name: AACR session navigation guide
what_it_solves: Navigation guide for AACR 2026 sessions relevant to CrisPRO outreach.
how_it_solves: AACR_SESSION_NAVIGATION.md maps sessions → dates → CrisPRO relevance score + assigned attendee.
why_it_exists: Turns AACR floor time into a routed lead-collection exercise instead of ad-hoc booth walking.
